calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108/MECH-439/MECH-450 same-layer learned-gating settling falsifier -- VALIDITY RE-TUNE (auto-magnitude-matched same-layer null + near-vacuity/below-A0 guards); supersedes V3-EXQ-700c
items.note: VALIDITY RE-TUNE LETTER routed by confirmed, user-gated (Reading B) failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-700c_2026-06-26. Config-only fix (no ree_core change); substrate built (substrate action=none). WHY 700c was precondition_unmet (NOT a falsification): the same-layer frozen-random W_lat null was injected at FIXED scale 0.5 giving median range 2.16 = 41.42x the realised learned A2/A3 settling range 0.052 (field_noise_magnitude_matched [0.25,4.0] FAILED) and drove committed-class entropy below A0 (0.859<0.909; noise_verified_lifting 0/3) = V3-EXQ-642 invalid-precondition family (same shape as 704's 176.9x); MECH-439/ARC-108/MECH-450 UNWEAKENED. FIX: (1) AUTO-COMPUTE the null scale at run time so the injected range == 1.0 x the realised median LEARNED W_lat range of the A2/A3 SIGNED arms ONLY (C3 unsigned abs-RPE tail range 1.9-4.8 EXCLUDED from match target + magnitude-match denominator), ratio ~1.0 in band by construction; (2) near-vacuity guard (median A2/A3 learned range must clear LEARNED_RANGE_VACUITY_FLOOR=5e-3); (3) explicit below-A0 destructive-null guard. All three self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue. KEPT VERBATIM: 5 arms (A0/A2_SETTLING_SIGNED/A3_BOTH_SIGNED/C3_SETTLING_UNSIGNED/ARM_NOISE) x 6 seeds, settling layer, landed arithmetic envelope matched-constant, GAP-A reef-bipartite size-12, phased P0/P1/P2 (250 ep/cell), committed-action-class entropy DV; A0/A2/A3/C3 byte-identical to 700b/700c. PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL for the validity question: magnitude-matched null verify-lifts AND learned settling still no lift => V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation, no more V3 letters (trips the brake-LOCK). RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (700c invalid-precondition, not a clean ceiling; the one validity-fixed letter the lock permits, same class as 704->704b/705->705b). claim_ids=[MECH-439,ARC-108,MECH-450]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING. Gates: validate_experiments --strict --paths OK + validate_queue OK + dry-run smoke exit 0 (substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy scale; field_noise_magnitude_matched=TRUE auto-match proven vs 700c 41.42x FALSE). Ingress: phase3-queue writer wiped the git entry (writer race), re-added via coordinator POST /queue/add (DB authoritative).

items.title: ARC-110 parallel segregated loop-segregation validation (motor/assoc/limbic loops + S2 in-layer null + ARC-109 D1/D2 + MECH-452 traces vs single arena)
items.note: Substrate-readiness validation for the v4_loop_segregation substrate (ARC-110 + coupled ARC-109 D1/D2 split + MECH-452 loop-local traces + S2 in-layer null) BUILT 2026-06-27 via /implement-substrate (full scope; PROMOTES NOTHING). EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic. Clears the re-derive brake on the conversion lineage: the upstream substrate is now built (ree-v3/ree_core/predictors/e3_selector.py _segregated_loop_arbitrate; gate cleared by V3-EXQ-704b FAIL-to-convert, the pre-registered positive-evidence-FOR-ARC-110 outcome). Routed by the confirmed cluster autopsy failure_autopsy_704b-706b-conversion-ceiling_2026-06-27. 4 arms x 6 seeds, ONLY swept factor = loop segregation: A0_SINGLE_ARENA (loop seg OFF, the 704b-A2 baseline) / A1_LOOPS (ARC-110 full stack) / ARM_NOISE (A1 + S2 in-layer same-layer null) / ARM_DROP_LIMBIC (A1, limbic loop ablated -- ARC-106 per-loop falsifier). PRE-REGISTERED decisive: A1 committed-class entropy strict-above A0 AND the valid in-layer null with live cross-loop variance => supports ARC-110 (single-arena collapse was a binding constraint on MECH-439); valid null verify-lifts + loops vary but no conversion => weakens ARC-110 (ceiling intrinsic). Non-degeneracy self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (loops pinned to motor winner / in-layer null inert / pool collapsed). prefer-cloud (machine_affinity any). Smoke: dry-run PASS (all 4 arms ran through the loop selector, manifest written, exit 0).
